Each Wild symbols will increase the bonus multiplier by 1 for this round and the rounds there after, up to 10X.

Payouts = Bet X Lines X Pay X Bonus Multiplier.

This game uses a dynamic paytable and the symbol payouts displayed below reflect the amount awarded for achieving the combination at the currently selected bet level.

Bet line wins pay if in succession starting from the leftmost reel to right according to paytable.
